heading: Disclosure of certain information to law enforcement agencies
label: 728 Disclosure of certain information to law enforcement agencies
text: In the event of circumstances requiring an evacuation, sheltering, or mass relocation, the Administrator may disclose information in any individual assistance database of the Agency in accordance with (commonly referred to as the “Privacy Act”) to any law enforcement agency of the Federal Government or a State, local, or tribal government in order to identify illegal conduct or address public safety or security issues, including compliance with sex offender notification laws.section 552a(b) of title 5
